languages.text: [TO BE CHANGED TEXT&ETUDES] Тайны Заркова манили многих исследователей, и со временем планета стала источником бесчисленного потока орудий войны, ядов и стимуляторов.
The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.
languages.original_text: Тайны Заркова манили многих исследователей, и со временем планета стала источником бесчисленного потока орудий войны, ядов и стимуляторов.

traits.locale_text: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.
The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.
The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.

languages.text: ザルコフの謎に惹かれた探検家たちは、その惑星を武器や毒薬、興奮剤の供給源として利用し、その結果、惑星は戦争の道具、毒薬、興奮剤の供給源となった。
languages.original_text: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの謎に惹かれた探検家たちは、その惑星を武器や毒薬、興奮剤の供給源として利用し、その結果、惑星は戦争の道具、毒薬、興奮剤の供給源となった。

languages.text: 扎尔科夫的无解之谜吸引了一代又一代探索者。久而久之，这颗行星逐渐变成了战争武器、毒药和兴奋剂的不竭产地。
languages.original_text: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫的无解之谜吸引了一代又一代探索者。久而久之，这颗行星逐渐变成了战争武器、毒药和兴奋剂的不竭产地。

languages.text: Les mystères de Zarkov attirèrent de nombreux explorateurs et, au fil du temps, la planète devint une source inépuisable d'armes de guerre, de poisons et de stimulants.
languages.original_text: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.

traits.locale_text: Les mystères de Zarkov attirèrent de nombreux explorateurs et, au fil du temps, la planète devint une source inépuisable d'armes de guerre, de poisons et de stimulants.

languages.text: Los misterios de Zarkov tentaron a muchos explorados, y, con el tiempo, el planeta se convirtió en la fuente de una serie interminable de armas de guerra, venenos y estimulantes.
languages.original_text: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.

traits.locale_text: Los misterios de Zarkov tentaron a muchos explorados, y, con el tiempo, el planeta se convirtió en la fuente de una serie interminable de armas de guerra, venenos y estimulantes.

languages.text: Zarkov'un gizemleri pek çok kâşifi cezbetti ve zamanla gezegen sonsuz bir savaş silahı, zehir ve uyarıcı akışının kaynağı hâline geldi.
languages.original_text: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'un gizemleri pek çok kâşifi cezbetti ve zamanla gezegen sonsuz bir savaş silahı, zehir ve uyarıcı akışının kaynağı hâline geldi.

languages.text: Die Mysterien von Zarkov lockten viele Forscher an, und so wurde der Planet eine Quelle für einen endlosen Strom von Kriegswaffen, Giften und Stimulanzien.
languages.original_text: The mysteries of Zarkov tempted many explorers, and over time the planet became the source of an endless stream of weapons of war, poisons, and stimulants.

traits.locale_text: Die Mysterien von Zarkov lockten viele Forscher an, und so wurde der Planet eine Quelle für einen endlosen Strom von Kriegswaffen, Giften und Stimulanzien.
